title: How Long Will You Forget me Lord

verses.text: How long will you forget me Lord? Forever will it be? How long, Lord, will you hide your face And turn your gaze from me?
How long must I be sad each day In deep perplexity? How long will my opponent stand In triumph over me?
O Lord, my God, consider me And give me your reply. Light up my eyes or I will sleep The sleep of those who die.
Then would my enemy declare “At last I brought him low!” And so my foes would sing for joy To see my overthrow.
But still I trust your steadfast love; Your saving pow’r I praise. The Lord has richly dealt with me; My songs to him I raise.
